notes:
v1.14.55 - ENTER SCREEN POLISH round 2 (5 changes; scope-locked to the entry screen; hold/enter JS body untouched; cyan stays the locked accent). #1 TITLE POSITION: moved the title cluster (FIELD INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM + PHANTOM + RACK.STACK.VERIFY) UP to fill the empty band below the globe - '#boot .pe-brand{top:52%->46%}'; that top:% is the single nudge dial; PHANTOM stays horizontally centered (verified, no overflow). #2 MORE CHROME: brighter upper-rim specular + crisper light/shadow on the bezel + ring2 + ring3 (single top light kept) - more polished steel. #3 REMOVED the in-core 'HOLD' text: deleted ONLY the DOM label node (
...
HOLD
); the hold handler binds to #pe-stage (not the label) and the JS glab ref is null-guarded, so hold-to-enter still fires - re-verified elementFromPoint(center)===DIV#pe-stage AND boot->app after removal. (Left the now-dead .pe-clabel/.pe-g CSS in place, harmless.) #4 INTENSIFIED the plasma core: bigger (54->60px) + more vivid multi-stop bloom (white-hot #fff -> #eafdff -> vivid #28e0ff -> soft fade); now the focal point with the text gone; reduced-motion rules unchanged = static. #5 CAL/LOCK CHIP HIDDEN from normal view: '#boot .pe-cal{display:none}' + '#boot.pe-calon .pe-cal{display:block}' so it only shows with ?cal=1 (the JS adds .pe-calon then) - drag-to-calibrate tool preserved (?cal=1 -> chip visible + 21 handles, verified); removed from the operator screen. NOTE: this also removes the on-screen triple-tap entry to cal mode (the chip is hidden) - ?cal=1 URL is now the only way in (per the handoff's intent). Gates: node --check 3/3, main
